name: 02-scheduled-fetch
description: Fetches San Francisco weather every minute from Open-Meteo and logs the result.
loomCode:
theme { skin:"default", layout:"wide", density:"comfortable" }

hero
  title:"SF Weather Monitor"
  subtitle:"Fetches San Francisco weather on a schedule and logs the results."
  size:"sm"
  align:"left"


section title:"Schedule" padding:"lg" {
  field cron cron
    as:text
    label:"Cron Expression"
    description:"How often the weather check runs. Default is every minute (`* * * * *`). Use standard cron syntax — e.g. `*/5 * * * *` for every 5 minutes."
}

section title:"Results" padding:"lg" {
  columns cols:2 gap:"xl" align:"stretch" {
    output log_weather data
      as:json
      height:"50vh"
      label:"Weather Log"
      placeholder:"Weather data will appear here after the trigger fires."
    output log_error data
      as:markdown
      height:"50vh"
      label:"Error Log"
      placeholder:"No errors yet. If something goes wrong, it will appear here."
  }
}

footer note:"Powered by Open-Meteo — free, no API key required."
layoutCode:
note @layout 0 0 280x320
cron @layout 360 0
fetch @layout 640 0
parse @layout 892 0
log_weather @layout 1144 0
log_error @layout 1144 129
